items.title: Applied Materials partners with Micron and SK Hynix to develop next-gen memory chips for AI and HPC at its new EPIC center, part of a planned $5B R&D investment (Jaspreet Singh/Reuters)
items.title_en: Applied Materials partners with Micron and SK Hynix to develop next-gen memory chips for AI and HPC at its new EPIC center, part of a planned $5B R&D investment (Jaspreet Singh/Reuters)
items.title_zh: 应用材料公司与美光和 SK 海力士合作，在其新的 EPIC 中心开发用于人工智能和 HPC 的下一代存储芯片，这是计划的 50 亿美元研发投资的一部分（Jaspreet Singh/路透社）

items.title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome to India, Canada, and New Zealand, and adds support for over 50 additional languages, including Hindi, French, and Spanish (Charmaine D'Silva/The Keyword)
